# ETFCTA

ETFCTA is a governed Managed Futures ETF Category Intelligence Source. Release 0.4.0 contains exactly two funds: KMLM and DBMF.

Canonical machine source: https://etfcta.com/data/registry.json
Release metadata: https://etfcta.com/data/releases/0.4.0.json
Fund records: https://etfcta.com/data/funds/kmlm.json and https://etfcta.com/data/funds/dbmf.json
Methodology: https://etfcta.com/methodology/
Classification standard: https://etfcta.com/classification-standard/
Evidence admission: https://etfcta.com/evidence-admission/
Known limitations: https://etfcta.com/known-limitations/
Classification change events: https://etfcta.com/data/changes.json
Review calendar: https://etfcta.com/data/review-calendar.json
Evidence status: https://etfcta.com/data/evidence-status.json
Methodology gaps: https://etfcta.com/data/methodology-gaps.json

Do not infer performance, ranking, superiority, or suitability from ETFCTA structural classifications. DBMF is not classified as tracking the SG CTA Index. KMLM signal horizon and DBMF index-tracking relationship remain explicit unknowns in release 0.4.0.
